name: Trie (Prefix Tree)
description: Implement a Trie (prefix tree) that supports insert, search, startsWith, and delete operations. The delete operation should only remove a word if it exists and should not affect other words that share a common prefix.
tests:
def test_insert_and_search():
    t = Trie()
    t.insert('apple')
    assert t.search('apple') == True
    assert t.search('app') == False

def test_starts_with():
    t = Trie()
    t.insert('apple')
    assert t.starts_with('app') == True
    assert t.starts_with('apx') == False

def test_delete():
    t = Trie()
    t.insert('apple')
    t.insert('app')
    assert t.delete('apple') == True
    assert t.search('apple') == False
    assert t.search('app') == True

def test_delete_nonexistent():
    t = Trie()
    t.insert('apple')
    assert t.delete('app') == False
    assert t.search('apple') == True

def test_count_prefix():
    t = Trie()
    t.insert('apple')
    t.insert('app')
    t.insert('application')
    t.insert('banana')
    assert t.count_prefix('app') == 3
    assert t.count_prefix('ban') == 1
    assert t.count_prefix('xyz') == 0

def test_empty_string():
    t = Trie()
    t.insert('')
    assert t.search('') == True
    assert t.starts_with('') == True
constraints: Words consist of lowercase English letters
All operations should be O(m) where m is word length
delete should return True if word existed, False otherwise
